mapper.sql: id, user_id, current_stage, status, reviewer_id, submitted_at, reviewed_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM application_process WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND current_stage = #{stage} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_process (user_id, current_stage, status, reviewer_id, submitted_at, reviewed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{currentStage}, #{status}, #{reviewerId}, #{submittedAt}, #{reviewedAt})
